allow: Bash(node -e "const d=require\(''./package-lock.json''\); const r=d.packages||{}; console.log\(''root react:'', r[''node_modules/react'']?.version||''not found''\); console.log\(''web react:'', r[''apps/web/node_modules/react'']?.version||''not found''\); console.log\(''mobile react:'', r[''apps/mobile/node_modules/react'']?.version||''not found''\); const styledJsx = Object.keys\(r\).filter\(k=>k.includes\(''styled-jsx''\)\); styledJsx.forEach\(k=>console.log\(k, r[k].version\)\);")
